sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ هِيَ اللُّغَةُ الَّتِي تَفْهَمُهَا الْحَوَاسِيبُ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je jezik koji računari razumiju.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is the language that computers understand.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ كَيْفِيَّةَ كِتَابَةِ الْأَكْوَادِ لِإِنْشَاءِ الْمَوَاقِعِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi studenti uče kako pisati kodove za kreiranje web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: Many students learn how to write code to create websites.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةِ يَفْتَحُ فُرَصَ عَمَلٍ كَبِيرَةً فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje ove vještine otvara velike poslovne prilike u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Learning this skill opens up great job opportunities in the future.
